# Concrete Lifting Insurance

> Specialized insurance for concrete lifting contractors serving the United States. Coverage for spray foam lifting, mud jacking, general liability, workers comp, pollution liability, and equipment breakdown.

Concrete Lifting Insurance is a specialty insurance program operated by Contractors Choice Agency (Josh Cotner, founder). We provide commercial insurance coverage exclusively for concrete lifting and leveling contractors. Our policies are endorsed specifically for spray foam polyurethane injection and traditional mud jacking/slab jacking operations—not generic commercial policies with hidden exclusions.

Address: 12220 E Riggs Road Suite #105, Chandler, AZ 85249
Phone: 844-967-5247
Email: josh@contractorschoiceagency.com
Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–5pm Arizona (MST)

## Site Pages

- [Home](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/): Overview of concrete lifting insurance programs
- [Services](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/services/): All coverage types offered
- [Coverages](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/coverages/): Detailed coverage pages
- [Get a Quote](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/quote/): Request a free insurance quote
- [About](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/about/): About Contractors Choice Agency and Josh Cotner
- [Contact](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/contact/): Contact form and phone
- [Blog / Resources](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/blog/): Expert articles on concrete lifting insurance

## Coverage Pages

- [General Liability](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/coverages/general-liability/): Third-party bodily injury and property damage, pollution liability endorsement for foam operations
- [Workers Compensation](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/coverages/workers-comp/): On-the-job injury coverage with correct NCCI classification codes for lifting work
- [Commercial Auto](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/coverages/commercial-auto/): Fleet and trailer coverage for concrete lifting rigs
- [Pollution Liability](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/coverages/pollution-liability/): Covers polyurethane foam as a pollutant; fills the gap in standard GL policies
- [Equipment Breakdown](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/coverages/equipment-breakdown/): Inland marine and breakdown coverage for spray foam pumps and mud jacking rigs

## Blog Topics

- [Complete Guide to Concrete Lifting Insurance](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/blog/complete-guide-to-concrete-lifting-insurance/): Overview of all coverage types, costs, and gaps
- [Spray Foam vs. Mud Jacking: Insurance Differences](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/blog/spray-foam-vs-mud-jacking-insurance/): How coverage requirements differ by method
- [General Liability for Concrete Lifting Contractors](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/blog/general-liability-for-concrete-lifting-contractors/): GL coverage details and the pollution exclusion
- [Equipment Coverage for Polyurethane Foam Contractors](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/blog/equipment-coverage-for-polyurethane-foam-contractors/): Inland marine and equipment breakdown coverage
- [Workers Comp for Concrete Leveling Crews](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/blog/workers-comp-for-concrete-leveling-crews/): Classification codes, EMR, and all-states coverage
- [How to Reduce Your Concrete Lifting Insurance Premium by 20%](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/blog/reduce-insurance-premium/): Bundling, deductibles, safety programs

## Coverage by Method

- Polyurethane foam injection / foam jacking / polyjacking
- Mud jacking / slab jacking / cementitious slurry leveling
- Combined programs for contractors offering both methods

## Target Audience

Concrete lifting and leveling contractors including: spray foam lifting companies, mud jacking contractors, concrete leveling firms, foundation repair contractors, and general concrete contractors offering lifting services as part of their scope.
